She also made false statements in court about my father, smearing his reputation in order to elicit a reaction from my brother and me. The real loser in this was my step mother. She was only left with $102,000 in insurance money and Jeanne Gale took half of that in legal fees. My step mother has Alzheimer's and needs the money for her care expenses. reviews.text: Leaving this review for Learner and Rowe Injury Attorneys. Its been a long road to getting to this point after my major accident I was involved in. A lot of pain and waiting going to all the Dr's getting MRIs and rehab needed to get my life back in order. Its been about 14 months I've been corresponding with my amazing case manager Jazmin Ortega located in Yuma, Im in Glendale. She's been there for me and making sure I know all that was going on though this process. I never had to go though this ever so I had no idea what to expect. I was told every step of the way. The other awesome part of my team Nicholas Rodriguez is my lein negotiator. He got the Dr bills reduced a ton. The Neurologist was over 30k and he got that down to just under half!! And not to mention the other Dr's I had to deal with big reductions. Im glad I did choose Learner and Rowe for my representation! I also got the full allotment the other guy had for Injury pay out and it was pretty high amount! Again thanks to my lein negotiator Nicholas getting me a pretty penny after all my medical expenses! Just like the commercials say, "One call, that's all" their not kidding 😀  I highly recommend you do the same and call Learner and Rowe and hope you can deal with Jazmin and Nicholas too. Not saying they dont have all great employees. I just had a great experience with my team assigned to me. Now Im laying on the couch relaxing till I get my surgery from the accident with my Gina. Learner and Rowe #1 in Phoenix!!!!

reviews.text: Working with Sonia and her team was a smooth and truly professional experience. They made everything easy from start to finish, and I felt supported every step of the way. I’ll gladly recommend their services to others and will definitely retain them again if I ever need to.

reviews.text: I needed an attorney for a child custody /child support case brought against me by my ex-wife. A friend of mine recommended Sonia to me and I was very satisfied. I have never had an attorney before and hope to never need one again, If I do though, I know who I'll be calling first. Sonia and her staff are very personal and friendly. It's an attorneys job to fight for you and she does just that, but there's something more to it than just that. I don't believe she takes the matter personal, a good attorney won't, but she is very sympathetic to the things that may be personal to you as a client. That little extra carries a lot of weight in my opinion. I was asking to keep the parenting time as it was at 50/50. My ex was trying for a more limited parenting schedule for me. Needless to say, it did get a little ugly. Sonia kept her composure and took the "high road" and in the end everything stayed as it was with the exception of some child support. Take it from someone who had everything to lose and nothing to gain, if you need an attorney to make things happen for you, look no further than Sonia's office. Her and her staff helped me to keep my son the same amount of time that I had before my ex filed paperwork. Once again Sonia and staff, thank you so much. You guy's are the greatest.

Sonia Ramirez is hands down the best attorney in Yuma.  She is very considerate, she is available to her clients which is a major plus as she does not forward your concerns on.  Her team she works with is up to date and is also available to answer questions and concerns and having a team that is knowledgeable is a major plus.  She amazed me a single father protecting the welfare of my child and she was amazing in research, her arguments in court and if I could give her 200 stars I would without question give her and her team that.  I walked in not knowing what to expect and left knowing she cares it felt like family to me.  I would suggest her anytime and will forever thank her for being there during such a hard time.

A horrifying experience that cost my brother and me over $41,000. My brother, step sister and I hired Jeanne Gale to deal with the conservatorship/guardianship of our parents. My brother and I live on the east coast and our step sister is local to Yuma. Jeanne Gale entered into an illicit relationship with our step sister where inventories were never properly filed and estate assets were hidden and ended up missing. Ms. Gale actually advised me to lie to my parents about their finances. Shocking for an Estate Attorney. After my father’s death the estate was poorly handled without proper inventories being filed. When my brother and I presented our father’s will she contested it and smugly claimed it was not her job to validate the will (thankfully we recorded this conversation). I had to validate the will through the AZ Bar Association. Ms. Gale and our step sister made false accusations about my brother and me tying us up in court for over two years. When my brother and I battled her in the courts she finally dropped out in the middle of litigation and left our step sister hanging. When it was all over Jeanne Gale made over $75,000 from her chicanery. My brother and I were out over $30,000 in legal fees and $11,000 in other related expenses. She also made false statements in court about my father, smearing his reputation in order to elicit a reaction from my brother and me. The real loser in this was my step mother. She was only left with $102,000 in insurance money and Jeanne Gale took half of that in legal fees. My step mother has Alzheimer's and needs the money for her care expenses. Jeanne Gale should be disbarred and sent to jail. I will gladly provide evidence of anything I have written if need be.
